title: Sour Chewy Show-off Algerian Fennel Stir-fry
description: A show-off Algerian fennel dish featuring sour elements like lemon and fermented vegetables, alongside chewy textures from almonds and chickpeas in a mediterranean-friendly twist. The dish uses melted butter for richness and is packed with Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: Fermented vegetables (e.g., sumac or limes)
ingredients.notes: For added sourness and depth of flavor

instructions: Wash the fennel bulb, cut it into wedges and remove the inner core. Toast the almonds in a dry pan until golden brown.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sliced garlic and toast for about 1 minute, being careful not to burn it.
Add the fennel wedges to the skillet and sprinkle with toasted almonds. Season lightly with salt and pepper, then drizzle with lemon juice.
Cook the chickpeas until they are just tender, around 5-7 minutes. Add them to the fennel mixture for a minute or two to combine flavors.
Gently fold in the melted butter into the fennel mix. If using fermented vegetables, add them last and gently stir them in.
Taste test and adjust seasonings if needed. Serve hot as a side dish or alongside a main protein.
